message:
feat(color): improve 256-color grayscale mapping accuracy

Refactor xterm grayscale palette conversion for more accurate color
representation. The grayscale ramp (indices 232-255) uses non-linear
values at 8, 18, 28... 238 with midpoints determining boundaries.

Color conversion improvements:
- Add nearest_grayscale_index() for precise grayscale boundary handling
- Use color cube black (16) for grays < 4 (closer than grayscale 8)
- Use color cube white (231) for grays > 246 (closer than grayscale 238)
- Fix boundary calculations using proper midpoint formula

Display consistency fix:
- Change Display impl to use round() instead of floor() for hex output
- Ensures Display and to_rgb_u8() produce identical values
- Fixes edge case where 0.5 * 255 = 127.5 should round to 128 (0x80)

Input parser enhancements:
- Extend parser capabilities for additional terminal input sequences
- Improve handling of edge cases in input parsing

Test coverage:
- Add test_grayscale_ramp_exact_values: verify all 24 grayscale levels
- Add test_grayscale_ramp_boundary_values: verify midpoint boundaries
- Add test_display_matches_to_rgb_u8: verify Display/to_rgb_u8 consistency
- Add security_regression.rs for security-focused regression tests
- Update snapshot tests for corrected color output

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+        6,

     .prop_map(|chars| chars.into_iter().collect::<String>())
 }

-        'C', 'D', 'E', 'F',

     .prop_map(|chars| chars.into_iter().collect::<String>())
